name: Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp Warrant
summary: Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on Fintech and consumer technology sectors in Southeast Asia. The warrant gives the holder the right to purchase shares of Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp. stock at a specified price.
